name: Brookwood Park
description: Brookwood Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dalton, GA. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: Edward's Park
description: Edward's Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dalton, GA. There are 12 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Lakeshore Park
description: Come play pickleball at Lakeshore Park in Dalton, GA! There are 20 outdoor asphalt courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
